title: Giant Foil Number 1 Balloon - 86 cm - Matte Baby Blue
features: 1 Matte Baby Blue Number 1 Foil Balloon
Number balloon measures 86 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Can be filled with helium or air via hand pump, and is self-sealing
Ideal for a 1st birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for any age
Combine with other baby blue party supplies from Unique Party
